'''fathomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassographer|thalassographer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassographer|thalassographer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæthemeth|fæthemeth]] || [[word:fæthemej|fæthemej]] || [[word:fæthemesh|fæthemesh]] || [[word:fætheme|fætheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothomoth|fathothomoth]] || [[word:fathothomoj|fathothomoj]] || [[word:fathothomosh|fathothomosh]] || [[word:fathothomo|fathothomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathomoth|fathomoth]] || [[word:fathomoj|fathomoj]] || [[word:fathomosh|fathomosh]] || [[word:fathomo|fathomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofmoth|fathofmoth]] || [[word:fathofmoj|fathofmoj]] || [[word:fathofmosh|fathofmosh]] || [[word:fathofmof|fathofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathomotho|fathomotho]] || [[word:fathomojo|fathomojo]] || [[word:fathomosho|fathomosho]] || [[word:fathomoko|fathomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathomoth|fathomoth]] || [[word:fathomoj|fathomoj]] || [[word:fathomosh|fathomosh]] || [[word:fathomo|fathomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathomothol|fathomothol]] || [[word:fathomojol|fathomojol]] || [[word:fathomoshol|fathomoshol]] || [[word:fathomokol|fathomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathomothotho|fathomothotho]] || [[word:fathomojojo|fathomojojo]] || [[word:fathomoshosho|fathomoshosho]] || [[word:fathomoko|fathomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathomothon|fathomothon]] || [[word:fathomojon|fathomojon]] || [[word:fathomoshon|fathomoshon]] || [[word:fathomokon|fathomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathomothoro|fathomothoro]] || [[word:fathomojoro|fathomojoro]] || [[word:fathomoshoro|fathomoshoro]] || [[word:fathomokoro|fathomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
